title: Add Windows and WSL support for T3 Code. Support running projects from both Windows filesystem and WSL distros in the same instance. Research dual-server architecture (Windows server + WSL server) for cross-boundary project support. Includes: WSL distro detection, wsl.exe server spawning, wslpath translation, auto-install of server binary inside WSL, and native file watching via inotify. Also fix Copilot SDK binary resolution on Windows.
